dcmEntity.title: Entitet atributa
dcmEntity.description: Entitet Attribute Filter-a ili Export pravila ('Patient', 'Study', 'Series', 'Instance', 'MPPS', 'MWL', 'UPS').

dcmCustomAttribute1.title: Proizvoljni atribut 1
dcmCustomAttribute1.description: Konfiguriši bilo koji atribut iz DICOM objekta koji treba da bude umetnut u bazu podataka kao Custom Attribute 1. Primjenjivo samo za Patient / Study / Series / Instance entitete. Npr. DicomAttribute[@tag="00200070"]/Value[@number="1"] ili za Private atribut DicomAttribute[@tag="00E10024" and @privateCreator="ELSCINT1"]/Value[@number="1"]

dcmCustomAttribute2.title: Proizvoljni atribut 2
dcmCustomAttribute2.description: Konfiguriši bilo koji atribut iz DICOM objekta koji treba da bude umetnut u bazu podataka kao Custom Attribute 2. Primjenjivo samo za Patient / Study / Series / Instance entitete. Npr. dcmCustomAttribute3.title: Proizvoljni atribut 3
dcmCustomAttribute3.description: Konfiguriši bilo koji atribut iz DICOM objekta koji treba da bude umetnut u bazu podataka kao Custom Attribute 3. dcmAttributeUpdatePolicy.title: Politika ažuriranja atributa
dcmAttributeUpdatePolicy.description: Specificira politiku ažuriranja za ekstraktovane atribute u DB na nivou Series, Study & Patient pri prijemu daljih instanci entiteta.
enum: PRESERVE|The attributes will be preserved. Nullify attributes in the new dataset which are not present in the original dataset. Any extra attributes will be nullified
SUPPLEMENT|The attributes will be overwritten. Attributes not present in original dataset will be supplemented. Any extra attributes with not null values will be added
MERGE|The attributes will be overwritten. Attribute values will be written from new dataset. Any attributes with not null values, shall not be overwritten by attributes with null values

OVERWRITE|The attributes will be overwritten. Attribute values if null in new dataset, will be nullified in original dataset. Any attributes with not null values, shall be overwritten by attributes with null values
REPLACE|The attributes will be completely overwritten
